enter_instruction: Drag the magenta film onto the cyan
controls_hint_none: No way through from here — undo or reset.
demo_try_other: Blocked — it would leave the frame. Try another way.
demo_sub_lumiere: White squares stop only the white.
demo_sub_verso: Push one way: the magenta goes the other.
demo_sub_repere: A pin pulls the film back to register.
demo_fusion_push: Push ← — the edge holds cyan, magenta catches up.
demo_fusion_split: ✕ then any direction (or {alt}) — cyan follows, magenta mirrors.
demo_fusion_split_done: Split. Each goes its own way.
demo_lumiere_blocked: Blocked — light stops the white piece.
demo_lumiere_pass: The inks pass. Only the white is stopped.
demo_glace_push: Push → — and watch how far it slides.
demo_glace_done: Ice. Everything slides until it hits.
demo_shift_blocked: Push → — magenta is walled in, the way is shut.
demo_shift_blocked_done: Blocked. No push will get in there.
demo_shift_do: ⇄ then ← (or {alt}) — slide the world under the pieces.
demo_shift_done: The world slid — magenta came to you. Merged.
demo_shift_through: Push → — merged, pass through the ink walls.
demo_shift_through_done: Where it was walled, the white passes. That's the key.
demo_verso_mirror: Cyan right, magenta left: the film is a mirror.
demo_verso_push2: Push → again — cyan meets the edge.
demo_verso_edge: The edge holds cyan; magenta glides on. One gesture, two fates.
demo_repere_shift: ⇄ then → (or {alt}) — slide the world off register.
demo_repere_off: The film is off register — see the pin at the centre.
demo_repere_pin: Push → — bring cyan onto the pin.
demo_repere_snap: The pin snaps the film home — magenta drops onto cyan. Merged.
win_complete: The edition is complete — for now.
win_hinted: solved with a hint · off the record
stamps_legend: Three stamps — pulled · ready to print · no touch-ups
daily_ea_tag: the artist's proof — every ink, a wider board. A new one each weekend day.
offline_daily_body: The daily challenge needs a connection. The campaign, though, plays offline.
error_daily_body: The daily challenge failed to load. Try again in a moment.
daily_signin_prompt: Sign in to join the leaderboard.
daily_leaderboard_empty: No one has solved it yet today.
level_leaderboard_empty: No scores yet — set the first.
profile_empty: No prints yet — solve today's puzzle.
profile_signin_prompt: Sign in to see your prints.
rule_decalage_aligned: ⇄ World (or {alt}) slides the magenta film. The registration marks must line up at the end.
rule_decalage_off: Registration off by [{x}, {y}] — watch the marks. Realign before the end.
rule_repere_off: Registration off by [{x}, {y}]. Bring an ink onto a pin: the register steps back a notch.
rule_verso: The magenta film reads the horizontal in reverse: push right, it goes left. The vertical, no.
rule_glace: Ice: everything slides until it hits something. White squares stop only the light.
rule_lightwalls: White squares block the merged piece — the inks pass through them. And vice versa.
rule_fusion_merged: Merged: the light passes through the inks. To split: ✕ then a direction (or {alt}) — cyan follows the arrow, magenta mirrors it.
rule_fusion_split: Bring them onto the same cell to merge. Each must end on its own circle.
rule_base: One gesture moves both points. Blocked by a wall or an edge, a point stays put.
hint_retenue: What blocks one frees the other.
hint_ecart: Lose your way to find it.
hint_diffraction: Split them at the right moment, the right way.
hint_trouvaille: Found by the machine. 21 moves at best.
hint_abysse: The deepest known. 22 moves at best.
hint_eclipse: White through ink. Ink through white.
hint_echange: Each must end where the other began.
hint_derive: Slide the world under the pieces. 22 moves at best.
hint_tectonique: Two splits, worlds in motion. 23 moves.
hint_reflet: What goes right comes back left.
hint_envers: Merge in a world that contradicts you.
hint_parallaxe: Mirror and ice at once. 20 moves at best.
hint_goupille: A pin sets the film back in register for you. 14 moves at best.
hint_aplomb: Each pin spares you a move. 19 at best.
hint_calage: Five mechanics, a pin that fuses the ink. 23 moves — the last.
